futureLaneSignals.quote: Today, we train more than 1,200 house staff in over 180 residency and fellowship programs.
futureLaneSignals.claimText: VUMC trains more than 1,200 house staff in over 180 residency and fellowship programs.
futureLaneSignals.tierAssignmentRationale: GME office statement of scope of residency/fellowship training — Tier 2 trainee programs.

futureLaneSignals.quote: The Office of Graduate Medical Education is committed to supporting the trainees, faculty, and staff in our many residency and fellowship programs for new physicians.
futureLaneSignals.claimText: GME office supports residency and fellowship programs for new physicians at VUMC.
futureLaneSignals.tierAssignmentRationale: GME office mission — residency/fellowship Tier 2.

futureLaneSignals.quote: If you would like to apply for a residency or fellowship at VUMC, visit our applicants page .
futureLaneSignals.claimText: Application pathway to residency or fellowship at VUMC is via applicants page.
futureLaneSignals.tierAssignmentRationale: Residency/fellowship application pathway — Tier 2.

futureLaneSignals.quote: Residency training began here with just 12 residents in 1925.
futureLaneSignals.claimText: VUMC residency training started in 1925 with 12 residents.
futureLaneSignals.tierAssignmentRationale: Historical residency context — Tier 2.

futureLaneSignals.quote:

futureLaneSignals.claimText: GME applicants navigation lists ERAS, stipends, sample house staff contract, training programs.
futureLaneSignals.tierAssignmentRationale: ERAS, stipends, training programs — Tier 2 residency/fellowship.

futureLaneSignals.quote: Elective Away Rotations
futureLaneSignals.claimText: GME navigation references Elective Away Rotations for house staff.
futureLaneSignals.tierAssignmentRationale: Listed under House Staff — refers to current residents going out on electives, not USCE visitors.
futureLaneSignals.limitations: Standalone navigation label; no details on incoming visiting eligibility.

futureLaneSignals.quote: Visiting Residents
futureLaneSignals.claimText: GME navigation references a Visiting Residents page.
futureLaneSignals.tierAssignmentRationale: Visiting Residents are GME-level trainees, not visiting medical students — Tier 2.
futureLaneSignals.limitations: Label only; no detail on eligibility or pathway.

futureLaneSignals.quote: Moonlighting
futureLaneSignals.claimText: House staff resources reference moonlighting.
futureLaneSignals.tierAssignmentRationale: Moonlighting is a trainee-stage benefit — Tier 2.

futureLaneSignals.quote: Sample House Staff Contract
futureLaneSignals.claimText: GME provides a sample house staff contract under Applicants.
futureLaneSignals.tierAssignmentRationale: House staff contract — Tier 2 trainee.

futureLaneSignals.quote: Vanderbilt Health is committed to fostering an environment where everyone has the chance to thrive and is committed to the principles of equal opportunity. EOE/Vets/Disabled.
futureLaneSignals.claimText: Vanderbilt Health EOE statement appears in page footer.
futureLaneSignals.tierAssignmentRationale: EEO statement is generic careers footer.

unresolveds: Whether VUMC accepts visiting medical students or observers is not addressed on this GME landing page; the 'Elective Away Rotations' and 'Visiting Residents' nav labels suggest separate sub-pages that should be captured next.
recommendedA2Focus: Capture the Visiting Residents sub-page linked from this GME nav.
Capture the Elective Away Rotations sub-page.
Search VUMC School of Medicine domain for visiting medical student / VSLO / observership pages — this GME page does not address pre-residency USCE.

claims.claimText: VUMC careers portal advertises a Physician Careers section.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: The careers home explicitly surfaces a Physician Careers track aimed at attending/faculty-level practice opportunities.

claims.claimText: Careers portal lists Advanced Practice Careers section.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Advanced practice (APP) careers are post-training clinical positions, fitting Tier 3.

claims.claimText: Careers portal references a Nurse Residency Program (nursing-only, not physician GME).
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Nurse residency is a training-pathway program; not physician GME but adjacent trainee tier.

claims.quote: contact VUMC Employee Relations at 615-343-4759 or employeerelations.vumc@vumc.org
claims.claimText: VUMC Employee Relations contact email and phone for employment accommodations.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Contact relates to employment accommodations within the careers/employment context.

futureLaneSignals.quote: explore our excellent benefits, many of which start on Day One
futureLaneSignals.claimText: VUMC advertises Day-One benefits as part of its employment offer.
futureLaneSignals.tierAssignmentRationale: Benefits language is part of the attending/employee compensation pathway, Tier 3.

recommendedA2Focus: Locate Vanderbilt physician careers detail pages for J-1 waiver / H-1B sponsorship signals.
Find VUMC visiting student / observership / elective pages outside the careers portal.

futureLaneSignals.quote: We value the experiences that visiting residents/fellows bring to our program, and we want to make sure that house staff from other institutions have every opportunity to come to VUMC and experience what we have to offer. Visiting rotations are subject to approval by the appropriate Program Director.
futureLaneSignals.claimText: VUMC offers visiting rotations for residents/fellows from other institutions, subject to Program Director approval.
futureLaneSignals.tierAssignmentRationale: Page is explicitly for visiting residents/fellows (house staff), which is Tier 2 trainee rotations, not pre-residency USCE.

futureLaneSignals.quote: To be eligible for a visiting rotation, you must be in an ACGME-accredited training program and must qualify for licensure or exemption from licensure under the Tennessee Board of Medical Examiners requirements
futureLaneSignals.claimText: Eligibility requires being in an ACGME-accredited training program and qualifying for Tennessee licensure or exemption.
futureLaneSignals.tierAssignmentRationale: Eligibility statement is for residents/fellows in ACGME-accredited programs — Tier 2.

futureLaneSignals.quote: Visiting resident applicants must apply 120 days or more from start date and have met all requirements 30 days or more prior to their requested start date. if this requirement is not met, the visiting resident's request to rotate will be cancelled and they will need to reapply.
futureLaneSignals.claimText: Visiting residents must apply ≥120 days before start date and meet all requirements ≥30 days prior.
futureLaneSignals.tierAssignmentRationale: Application timeline applies to visiting residents — Tier 2.

futureLaneSignals.quote: The Program Coordinator of the VUMC program with which you desire to rotate must initiate a contract /program letter of agreement process at least 100 days before your desired start date .
futureLaneSignals.claimText: Program Coordinator must initiate program letter of agreement ≥100 days before start date.
futureLaneSignals.tierAssignmentRationale: Process is part of visiting resident onboarding — Tier 2.

futureLaneSignals.quote: A completed and signed visiting resident application Click here for application . This will need to be approved by the VUMC Program Director. The application requires your NPI number.
futureLaneSignals.claimText: A signed visiting resident application requiring NPI number, approved by VUMC Program Director, is required.
futureLaneSignals.tierAssignmentRationale: Application document requirements for visiting residents — Tier 2.

futureLaneSignals.quote: A reference letter from your Program Director stating whether you are in good standing in an accredited training program.
futureLaneSignals.claimText: A reference letter from home Program Director attesting to good standing is required.
futureLaneSignals.tierAssignmentRationale: Document requirement for visiting resident rotation — Tier 2.

futureLaneSignals.quote: Documentation that your institution will continue to provide your stipend along with benefits, liability and health insurance (can be in the same letter as above).
futureLaneSignals.claimText: Home institution must document continued stipend, benefits, liability, and health insurance during rotation.
futureLaneSignals.tierAssignmentRationale: Document requirement for visiting resident — Tier 2.

futureLaneSignals.quote: A copy of your malpractice liability insurance with a minimum of $1 million per claimant and $3 million per occurrence, with the exception that Tennessee state employees do not need additional coverage.
futureLaneSignals.claimText: Malpractice insurance of ≥$1M/claimant and $3M/occurrence required (TN state employees exempt).
futureLaneSignals.tierAssignmentRationale: Malpractice insurance requirement for visiting residents — Tier 2.

futureLaneSignals.quote: If you are in a residency/fellowship in Tennessee and do not have your own medical license, a copy of the letter of exemption from licensure (your program or GME Office will have this). Note: If you are not in a Tennessee residency/fellowship and do not have full TN medical license, VUMC will request an exemption from licensure for you.
futureLaneSignals.claimText: Licensure or licensure-exemption letter required; VUMC will request exemption for non-TN residents without TN license.
futureLaneSignals.tierAssignmentRationale: Licensure requirement for visiting residents — Tier 2.

futureLaneSignals.quote: If applicable, a copy of a valid ECFMG certificate and Visa.
futureLaneSignals.claimText: Valid ECFMG certificate and visa required if applicable.
futureLaneSignals.tierAssignmentRationale: ECFMG/visa requirement for IMG visiting residents — Tier 2.

futureLaneSignals.quote: Immunization Form. This form must be completed by a healthcare provider other than the perspective visiting resident/fellow and sent to the Program Coordinator of the program with which you will rotate.
futureLaneSignals.claimText: Immunization Form completed by a healthcare provider (not self) is required.
futureLaneSignals.tierAssignmentRationale: Immunization document requirement for visiting residents/fellows — Tier 2.

futureLaneSignals.quote: Completion of the consent form from Cisive will initiate the background check. Cisive will contact you with a web link to initiate your background check.
futureLaneSignals.claimText: Cisive-administered background check is required.
futureLaneSignals.tierAssignmentRationale: Background check requirement for visiting residents — Tier 2.

futureLaneSignals.quote: please feel free to contact Lisa (615-322-4916 or lisa.king-rowan@vumc.org ) or our office email ( gme.office@vumc.org ).
futureLaneSignals.claimText: GME contacts: Lisa King-Rowan (615-322-4916, lisa.king-rowan@vumc.org); office gme.office@vumc.org.
futureLaneSignals.tierAssignmentRationale: GME contact for visiting residents — Tier 2.

recommendedA2Focus: Confirm this page is exclusively for visiting residents/fellows (Tier 2) and not for visiting medical students; pre-residency USCE applicants should be directed elsewhere.
